content.en:
100,000 contribution points is also a big number for Ye Tian's vest, and it takes a lot of time to get it.

However, the Eternal Great Ape Clan was helping him with this vest, so he managed to scrape together 100,000 contribution points without much effort.

Subsequently.

He used 100,000 contribution points to exchange for a place to enter the land of the Golden Inheritance on the other side.

......

On the other side of the True Beast Alliance, the place of golden inheritance is inside the core peak of the Eternal Mountain Range, where the True Beast Alliance is located.

At the beginning, the place of inheritance of the golden text on the other side was definitely not here, but they moved it here.

Soon.

Ye Tian came to the land of the golden text inheritance on the other side, a void cave that emitted golden light, and entering here was entering the land of the golden text inheritance on the other side.

Ye Tian did not hesitate at all, and directly entered it.

On the other side, the land of golden inheritance.

At this moment, Ye Tian was in a world of golden light.

The assessment is coming.

Airplanes!!!

A golden text from the other side appeared in front of Ye Tian.

He needs to understand this golden text on the other side before he can pass this assessment.

"Then let's start enlightening!"

Ye Tian began to comprehend this golden text on the other side with all his might.

Time passes slowly.

It is difficult for Jin Wen on the other side to comprehend, so the time given is very long.

But.

For Ye Tian, it is naturally not difficult to understand this golden text on the other side at the specified time.

After a long time.

Ye Tian successfully comprehended this golden text on the other side and passed the first assessment.

Immediately afterwards, ten golden texts on the other side appeared, allowing him to continue to comprehend, which was the second level of the inheritance of the golden texts on the other side.

Ye Tian continued to comprehend, and for him, this second level assessment was not difficult.

After a long time, Ye Tian understood these ten golden texts on the other side again.

"That's right, there are more and more golden texts on the other side of the other side of the golden text inheritance place, so that I have more and more golden texts on the other side!"

Ye Tian muttered.

Airplanes!!!!!

Hundreds of golden inscriptions appeared all around.

This time, it would take him a long time to comprehend these hundreds of golden texts from the other side.

One primeval epoch after another has passed.

Ye Tian has been here to comprehend the golden text on the other side, and has not gone out, and the powerhouses of the True Beast Alliance in the outside world are naturally puzzled, and they all guess that Ye Tian may have passed the first level.

And the Eternal Giant Ape Clan was extremely excited, they thought that Ye Tian had mastered more and more Golden Texts on the other side, which meant that their Eternal Giant Ape Clan had mastered so many Golden Texts on the other side!

This is a good thing that will help the development of the Eternal Great Ape Clan!

It's a pity that Ye Tian is not really an Eternal Giant Ape, this is just one of his vests.

this day.

Ye Tian finally understood the one hundred golden texts on the other side of the third level, and entered the fourth level of the inheritance of the golden texts on the other side.

Moment.

The dense golden inscriptions on the other side shrouded the void around him, and there were a thousand golden inscriptions on the other side.

If he understands them all, he will have mastered more than a thousand golden texts on the other side!

When he thought of this, he was extremely excited.

"Keep going!"

Ye Tian muttered.

In order to ensure that he could comprehend all the golden texts on the other side within the specified time, he even purchased treasures in Guheng Mountain that would help temporarily improve his comprehension.

Although the effect of these treasures is not as good as the Enlightenment Fruit on the other side, some of them are really good.

If it weren't for these treasures, he would have liked to have made it through the third level, but what if he hadn't.

So, it's better to be on the safe side.

With these treasures, after eating the other copies of his body, his comprehension skyrocketed, and he assisted in enlightenment.

Gradually, one after another Jin Wen on the other side was understood by him.

And Ye Tian hadn't come out of the land of the Golden Inheritance on the other side for a long time, and this matter even alarmed a big man in the True Beast Alliance.

Rumble!!!!

This great figure descended on the other side of the land of the inheritance of the golden text.

"I've seen Junzu!"

Jun Zu, an existence like the Lord of the True Beast Alliance, whose strength is extremely terrifying, is one of the deputy leaders of the True Beast Alliance.

"Who is in the land of the inheritance of the golden text on the other side, and has not come out yet?"

Jun Zu asked.

Then.

An Eternal Giant Ape of the Eighth Bone Transformation Realm said, "Qi Yu Jun Ancestor, one of the juniors in our clan!"

"Very good, when he comes out, remember to come to me!"

After Jun Zu finished speaking, he left.

Several of the Eight Bone Transformation Realms of the Eternal Giant Ape Clan were all excited, this was a great opportunity to embrace Jun Zu, the backer!

Immediately, they replied, "Yes!"

Another incomparably long period has passed.

Nine hundred and ninety-seven!

Nine hundred and ninety-eight!

Nine hundred and ninety-nine!

Finally, Ye Tian successfully comprehended the thousandth Golden Text of the other side, and completely passed the fourth level.

However.

When he thought that the fifth level of the other side of the gold text would be 10,000 gold of the other side, he found that there was no fifth level at all, and this fourth level was the last level.

Rumble!!!!!!

A golden inheritance mark from the other side poured into his will.

This includes all the golden inscriptions of the other side of this place where the golden inscriptions of the other side are inherited.

"One thousand eight hundred and sixty-six golden texts on the other side, all the golden texts on the other side are so many, no wonder there are not many golden texts on the other side here, this is not just not much, it is obviously too little!"

Ye Tian muttered.

"It's time to get out!"

Ye Tian went out from the land of the Golden Inheritance on the other side, and saw the eighth-stage bone transformation realm of the Eternal Giant Ape Clan, as well as many bone transformation realms, as if they were all waiting for him to come out and greet him here.

"Dong Yuan, Jun Zu wants to see you!"

An eight-time bone transformation realm eternal giant ape said.

Dong Yuan is the name of the current Eternal Great Ape Vest.

"Junzu, who is it?"

Ye Tian asked.

He doesn't know Junzu yet, but he should be very powerful.

The Eighth Bone Transformation Realm Eternal Giant Ape hurriedly said, "Jun Zu is the deputy leader of our True Beast Alliance!"

"Deputy Alliance Leader!

Ye Tian understood, this is clearly an existence comparable to the Lord of Eternal Zero, this kind of existence wants to see him!

He quickly figured it out, it was clear that he had broken into the place of the inheritance of the golden text on the other side, which alarmed Jun Zu!

"Maybe it's a good opportunity!"

He originally wanted to give up this Eternal Giant Ape Vest, but if he could get in touch with Jun Zu, such as becoming a disciple of the other party, then this Vest would have use value, at least it could bring great benefits to the original body replicating the body!

Thereupon.

He immediately went to see that Jun Ancestor under the leadership of the Eight Bone Transformation Realm Eternal Giant Ape.

True Beast Alliance.

Juntian Palace.

Junzu lives here.

According to the introduction of the Eternal Giant Ape of the Eighth Bone Transformation Realm, Jun Zu is the only Eternal True Beast in the True Beast Alliance that does not have a race, and no one knows what the body is.

Therefore, they have hope to tie up with Junzu.

Otherwise, if you are the deputy alliance leader of other races, how can you care about the geniuses of other races!
